meaning: v.砰地关上,砰地放下,猛力抨击,冲击n.砰,猛击,撞击,冲击
examples: They won the grand slam in 1990.
I heard the door slam behind him.
She gave the door a good hard slam.
As it turns out, the fishing leg of the slam will be the easiest to accomplish.
The first two legs of the slam turned out to be a pleasurable breeze.
